entities.name: SOLAR BASED IRRIGATION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Technology using solar energy to power irrigation systems to improve agricultural productivity and water management

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region in Africa characterized by rainfed agricultural systems and erratic rainfall patterns

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: Country in sub-Saharan Africa where the case study on solar-based irrigation was conducted

entities.name: BOUGUNI
entities.description: District in southern Mali evaluated for the suitability of solar-based irrigation

entities.name: KOUTIALA
entities.description: District in southern Mali evaluated for the suitability of solar-based irrigation

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Erratic and unreliable precipitation pattern that limits agricultural productivity in SSA

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: Degradation of agricultural land due to ongoing cultivation and erosion

entities.name: FOOD SHORTAGE
entities.description: Lack of sufficient food resulting from land degradation and population growth

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: Period of low rainfall where solar-based irrigation enables vegetable production and income

entities.name: BOOLEAN AND FUZZY METHODS
entities.description: Analytical methods used to understand farmers' perceptions and identify suitable areas for SBIS

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Crops produced using solar-based irrigation systems to increase household income

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals for which solar-based irrigation systems provide domestic water

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, which is low in SSA due to rainfall and soil issues

entities.name: WATER MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Sustainable and efficient practices key to improving agricultural productivity

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of natural resources to ensure sustainability and productivity

entities.name: SOILS
entities.description: Fragile soils in SSA that contribute to low agricultural productivity

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: Access to sufficient and nutritious food, hampered by lack of reliable water resources

entities.name: WATER RESOURCES
entities.description: Available water in the subsurface hydrological system

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: Financial gain for rural farm households through dry season vegetable production

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technologies like SBIS that help agriculture adapt to climate change and improve resilience
